register.title: Create an account

forgotPassword.description: Enter your email to receive a reset link

verifyEmail.title: Check your email

verifyEmail.notReceived: Didn't receive the email? Check your spam folder or try registering again.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
